strengths: Clear and effective communication of the topic with well-defined key terms and logical visual signposting
Wellâarticulated purpose and coherent overview linking biodiesel chemistry to industrial context
weaknesses: Minor repetition in the introduction slightly dilutes concision
Research question covers two dependent variables, which broadens focus and could have been narrowed or better justified
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The criterion strands were assessed as follows: topic communication (band 5), research question focus (upper band 3â4), and methodology (upper band 3â4). Overall the introduction and framing are strong and purposeful, with only small lapses in laser-sharp focus. Awarding 5 marks reflects a secure performance in the top band while acknowledging the dual-variable breadth and minor repetitiveness.

strengths: Mostly accurate and consistent use of subject-specific terminology and balanced chemical equations
Clear demonstration of coherent subject knowledge in triglyceride and transesterification chemistry
weaknesses: Application of some sources remains descriptive rather than critically integrated
Occasional lapses in algebraic manipulation and limited depth in kinetic/thermodynamic discussion
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Terminology and subject knowledge comfortably meet the upper 3â4 band, with clear but not fully exhaustive chemical treatment. Source application shows mostly relevant citations but lacks deep critical engagement. A score of 4 captures solid competence without reaching the consistently exceptional use of materials needed for band 5â6.

strengths: Well-supported analysis using means, standard deviations, error bars and ANOVA
Thoughtful evaluation with realistic methodological improvements and acknowledgement of anomalies
weaknesses: Critical evaluation sometimes remains descriptive rather than deeply analytical
Lacks discussion of power analysis and prioritization of proposed refinements
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three strands fall in the 4â6 band (adequate research, clear analysis, good discussion/evaluation). The work shows well-supported conclusions and realistic critique but stops short of sustained excellence in critical sophistication. Awarding 6 places the student at the top of this band, reflecting strong but not exceptional critical thinking.

strengths: Essay follows all formal EE/IA structural conventions with effective internal signposting
Comprehensive table of contents and correctly applied section headings ensure navigability
weaknesses: Some figure/table labelling departs from IB conventions and image resolution is occasionally poor
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Structure fully meets the highest rubric expectations and all layout elements are present. Minor lapses in caption style and image quality prevent a flawless professional polish. A top-band score of 4 reflects very strong communication with only minor presentation issues.

strandSelections.reasoning: The essay follows the required EE structureâtitle page, contents, abstract substitute, introduction, methodology, results, discussion, conclusion, evaluation, bibliography and appendices. Logical progression is evident, and internal headings (AâE sections) guide the reader effectively. Minor redundancies and occasional lengthy tables embedded in the main text slightly impede flow, but overall structural organisation meets the highest rubric expectations.

The introduction presents a concise, discipline-appropriate title, a clearly articulated purpose, and a coherent overview of the industrial and scientific context. Key terms such as âfree fatty acid contentâ, ârust-removal efficiencyâ and âpeanut oil extraction conditionsâ are defined and linked logically to the chemistry of biodiesel. Visual signposting (sub-headings, figures, equation boxes) keeps the reader oriented and demonstrates a sustained focus on the central idea. Minor repetition in the opening section and a double-focus on two dependent variables slightly dilute the sharpness of focus, hence a secure rather than perfect performance within the top band.

The student processes data competently: means, standard deviations, error bars and a one-way ANOVA are used to interrogate significance. The discussion links observed trends to chemical reasoning (triglyceride breakdown, lipase activity, solvent properties). While some causal claims are tentative and the magnitude of effects is modest, conclusions are generally supported by data. Deeper thermodynamic analysis or modelling is absent, preventing âexcellentâ sophistication, but the work shows a clear, well-supported analytical thread suitable for a mid-band 5.

Five replicate trials for titration and rust tests produce a moderate data set with calculated uncertainties and statistical analysis (mean, SD, ANOVA). The research remains largely relevant to the question, but the choice of rust-removal as a proxy for cleaning efficiency is not fully validated, and some procedural limitations (e.g., uncontrolled biodiesel purity) weaken data quality. These factors align with the âadequate â¦ partially relevantâ descriptor, meriting the lower end of the 4â6 band.

The essay demonstrates clear understanding of triglyceride chemistry, transesterification, fatty-acid titration and corrosion reactions. Explanations are generally coherent, use balanced equations correctly and link chemical principles to experimental observations. Occasional oversimplifications (e.g., conflating solvent action with corrosion phenomena) and limited depth in thermodynamic or kinetic treatment prevent full fluency, but the overall command of subject content is strong within the 3â4 bandâs upper level.

Technical vocabularyâfree fatty acids, transesterification, hydrolysis, ANOVA, viscosityâappears frequently and is mostly used accurately. Chemical equations are provided for key reactions, and units/uncertainties are stated in apparatus lists and data tables. Minor lapses (e.g., âlipase highly activatedâ phrasing, occasional algebraic slips) are present but do not impede comprehension. The usage meets the âmostly accurateâ descriptor and edges toward consistency, justifying a score at the top of the 3â4 band.

The student provides step-by-step procedures for extraction, titration, transesterification, rusting and rust-removal tests, supported by comprehensive tables of apparatus, quantities and uncertainties. Most controls (e.g., mass of peanuts, NaCl concentration, biodiesel volume) are stated and justified. Evidence of informed selection is present in the choice of analytical methods (standard deviation, one-way ANOVA). Nonetheless, some methodological choices (e.g., one-week rusting followed by one-day cleaning, potential confounding by biodiesel impurities) are acknowledged but not fully resolved, preventing clear demonstration of âeffectiveâ rather than merely âsomeâ selection. This places the work solidly in the 3â4 band.

Required layout elementsâtitle, word count, page numbers, table of contents, labelled figures/tables and consistent citation styleâare present. Figure/Table labelling occasionally departs from IB conventions and some images are of low resolution, reducing professional polish. Nevertheless, the essential formal requirements are met, aligning with the 3â4 band; a score of 3 reflects these minor shortcomings.

The discussion integrates literature to validate or challenge findings, recognises anomalies (overlapping error bars, impurity effects) and proposes plausible chemical explanations (viscosity, oxidation stability). The evaluation identifies methodological weaknesses and offers realistic improvements (vacuum distillation, SEM analysis, inert storage). While the critique is thoughtful, it sometimes remains descriptive rather than deeply critical, and alternative interpretations are limited. This corresponds to a solid performance in the 4â6 band, at the upper end.

Source material is generally relevantâjournals, textbooks and reputable websites are cited for chemical mechanisms, extraction processes and corrosion theory. Citations appear at points of factual reference in the background and discussion. However, several sources are descriptive websites, and integration into the argument is often surface-level (e.g., lengthy quotations of definitions, limited critical comparison). Consequently, application is âmostlyâ rather than âconsistentlyâ appropriate, matching the middle band.

The research question is explicitly stated verbatim in both the title page and Section A, and it is generally focused on three extraction conditions and two measurable responses. The variables are identifiable and operationally defined, showing an adequate link to the forthcoming discussion. However, combining two distinct dependent variables in one question (FFA content and rust-removal efficiency) introduces some breadth that weakens the razor-sharp focus expected at the top of the rubric. Thus the strand satisfies the descriptors for 3â4, leaning toward the upper end.

annotations.comment: The one-week rusting duration is chosen without justification; cite corrosion kinetics literature or preliminary tests to validate this timeframe and strengthen methodological rigor.

The research question combines two distinct dependent variables (FFA content and rust-removal efficiency), which broadens the focus and weakens the razor-sharp link expected. Consider narrowing the question to one main response or justifying the dual focus with greater methodological integration.

Figure 1 caption includes a full URL rather than a concise reference; adopt IB citation style by providing a brief source name in the caption and moving the URL to the bibliography for cleaner presentation.

The transesterification equation is embedded as an image, which hampers clarity and editing; reformat the reaction using inline LaTeX ($$\ce{RCOOR' + 3 MeOH -> 3 RCOOMe + \tfrac{1}{xyz}Glycerol}$$) for consistency.
The controlled variables list is thorough but lacks explanation of how each control specifically mitigates confoundingâlink each item to the corresponding potential bias or variance source.
Consider quantifying the brown rust color via spectrophotometry or image analysis to move beyond qualitative observation and strengthen data depth.
Standard deviations are reported to three significant figures despite the underlying data precision; adjust to two significant figures to match the least precise measurement.
Independent and dependent variables are clearly and operationally defined, establishing a focused methodology and enhancing reproducibility.
The table of contents is comprehensive and correctly formatted, providing clear navigation through sections, subsections, and page numbers in line with EE conventions.
The formula for %FFA is presented without immediate variable definitions; for clarity, annotate each symbol (e.g., $V_{\mathrm{NaOH}}$, $N_{\mathrm{NaOH}}$, $M$) directly adjacent to the equation.
The apparatus table lists equipment alongside stated uncertainties, demonstrating effective selection and understanding of measurement precision in line with scientific standards.
The ANOVA table correctly lists SS, df, MS, F and p-value, but omits explicit mention of degrees of freedom and F-crit context; define each term in the narrative for clarity.

Rust-removal ANOVA shows non-significance, yet the evaluation omits consideration of potential Type II error or power analysis; include a discussion of sample size and effect size to strengthen reliability.
The inclusion of an explicit word count at the start meets IB formatting requirements and demonstrates attention to administrative conventions.

The background on Indonesiaâs biodiesel industry relies heavily on descriptive website sources without critical analysis of their reliability or a comparison of alternative data; integrate more peer-reviewed studies to deepen the contextual understanding.

The qualitative titration description repeats color changes but omits chemical reasoning about indicator pH transition; link the phenolphthalein endpoint to its pH range for deeper conceptual understanding.
The inclusion of formulae for mean and standard deviation shows competence in foundational statistical analysis and supports reproducibility of data processing.
Figure 12 lacks annotations of statistical significance (e.g., p-value or asterisks); add markers to clarify which differences are statistically supported.
Although error bars overlap in Figure 13, the discussion does not address non-significance in rust-removal differences; integrate this into interpretation to avoid overstating trends.
Bibliography entries show inconsistent use of italics (journal titles) and irregular indentation; apply a uniform citation style consistently throughout for professional presentation.
Several discussion points rely on blog and non-peer-reviewed sources; supplement or replace these with academic journal articles to ensure robust, scholarly support for claims.
The conclusion restates findings but does not explicitly reference the research question; align the closing sentences to the original question to reinforce focus and coherence.
The evaluation section identifies many improvements but lacks prioritization of the most critical methodological flaws; consider ordering recommendations by their expected impact on data quality.
Future work suggestions are broad (e.g., fermenting peanuts); refine recommendations by specifying experimental variables, measurement techniques, or target outcomes for actionable planning.
